images.name: psychiatry_depressed_patient_mac
images.prompt: A compassionate portrait of a depressed patient sitting alone on a couch by a dim window, arms wrapped around themselves, gazing softly outward with a melancholic yet gentle expression.

images.name: psychiatry_recovery_mac
images.prompt: A hopeful psychiatry scene: a depressed patient beginning to recover, sitting by a window with a small growing plant, soft warm light returning, gentle expression of relief. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, muted then warming tones. Centered composition, subject fully visible.
